image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Here's what science actually says about cartilage joints.
Context visual: Cartilage joints are crucial for movement, acting like shock absorbers in your body.
Escalation visual: Without them, bones would grind against each other, causing pain.
Evidence visual: Research shows healthy cartilage can adapt under pressure, ensuring longevity.
Pattern Interrupt visual: But did you know that cartilage has no blood supply? It relies on joint movement for nourishment.
Payoff visual: This means staying active is vital for maintaining healthy cartilage.
Cta visual: Want to learn more about your body? Hit that follow button!
